case_title: ZSUZSANNA LEGRADI VS. UNITED PARCEL SERVICE CO et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGRADI, ZSUZSANNA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEGRADI, ZSUZSANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE CO T-MOBILE USA, INC. $410.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $410.00, DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE CO. SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $100.00. DEFENDANT T-MOBILE, USA INC. SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $310.00 AND PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED COSTS OF $0 AGAINST DEFENDANT T-MOBILE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE CO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-26-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-26-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES, EXCEPT DEFENDANT T-MOBILE USA, INC. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY THOMAS NICHOLS--SECURITY SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE CO T-MOBILE USA, INC.

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGRADI, ZSUZSANNA AS TO DEFENDANT T-MOBILE USA, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-10-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE CO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2013 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO FEB-26-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS TODAY. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES, EXCEPT DEFENDANT T-MOBILE. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY THOMAS NICHOLS--SECURITY SUPERVISOR. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL C. LAW. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2013 - JUDGMENT.
